venues.name: International Conference on Software Engineering
venues.notes: A premier general software engineering conference.

venues.name: ACM International Conference on the Foundations of Software Engineering
venues.notes: A premier software engineering conference formerly known as ESEC/FSE.

venues.name: IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering
venues.notes: A premier venue for automated techniques, tools, and foundations for software engineering.

venues.name: ACM SIGSOFT International Symposium on Software Testing and Analysis
venues.notes: A leading symposium for software testing and program analysis.

venues.name: ACM/IEEE International Conference on Model Driven Engineering Languages and Systems
venues.notes: A primary conference for model-driven engineering research and practice.

venues.name: International Conference on Conceptual Modeling
venues.notes: A long-running venue for conceptual modeling research and applications.

venues.name: International Conference on Advanced Information Systems Engineering
venues.notes: A major information systems engineering conference with strong links to modeling, requirements, architecture, and process engineering.

venues.name: IEEE International Enterprise Distributed Object Computing Conference
venues.notes: A conference on enterprise computing, enterprise architecture, process modeling, service systems, and model-driven approaches.

venues.name: IEEE International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution
venues.notes: A premier venue for software maintenance, evolution, comprehension, and related empirical and tooling research.

venues.name: Empirical Software Engineering
venues.notes: A major journal for empirical software engineering research.

venues.name: ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology
venues.notes: ACM archival journal for software engineering and methodology. Impact factor follows ACM's 2025 impact factor announcement.

venues.name: Journal of Systems and Software
venues.notes: A broad software systems and software engineering journal.

venues.name: IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering
venues.notes: A flagship journal covering the software engineering discipline.

venues.name: Information and Software Technology
venues.notes: A software engineering and information systems journal covering methods, tools, empirical studies, and technology transfer.

venues.name: Software and Systems Modeling
venues.notes: A journal focused on software and systems modeling, model-driven engineering, modeling languages, tools, and applications. The 2025 impact factor is reported in the SoSyM 2025 summary editorial.
